exercises.title: Count to 5
exercises.instructions: Use a for loop to print the numbers 1 to 5, each on a new line.
exercises.hints: Use a for loop: for (let i = 1; i <= 5; i++)

exercises.title: For Loop: Print 1-10
exercises.instructions: Use a for loop to print numbers 1 through 10, each on a new line.

exercises.title: For Loop: Even Numbers
exercises.instructions: Use a for loop to print all even numbers from 2 to 10, each on a new line.
exercises.hints: Start at 2 and step by 2 with i += 2

exercises.title: For Loop: Sum 1 to 5
exercises.instructions: Use a for loop to calculate the sum of numbers from 1 to 5 and print the result.
exercises.hints: Add each i to total inside the loop, then print total after the loop

exercises.title: Multiply Table
exercises.instructions:
Print the 5 times table (5*1 through 5*10), each on a new line.
Format: 5 x 1 = 5
exercises.hints: Use a for loop with range 1..10 and a template literal.

exercises.title: For Loop: Multiplication Table
exercises.instructions: Print the 3 times table from 3x1 to 3x5 in the format '3 x 1 = 3'.
exercises.hints: Multiply 3 by i inside the template literal

exercises.title: While Loop: Countdown from 10
exercises.instructions: Use a while loop to count down from 10 to 1.
exercises.hints: Print count, then use count-- to decrease it

exercises.title: While Loop: Double Until 100
exercises.instructions: Start with 1 and keep doubling it while it is less than 100. Print each value.
exercises.hints: Use num = num * 2 to double the value each iteration

exercises.title: For...of: Loop Through an Array
exercises.instructions: Loop through the array of fruits and print each one.
exercises.hints: Use for (let fruit of fruits) to iterate through each item

exercises.title: For Loop: Count Vowels
exercises.instructions: Count how many vowels (a, e, i, o, u) are in the word 'education' and print the count.
exercises.hints: Loop through each letter of word and check if it's in the vowels string with .includes()

exercises.title: While Loop: Sum Until 50
exercises.instructions: Keep adding numbers starting from 1 until the total reaches or exceeds 50. Print the final total.

exercises.title: For Loop: Reverse Countdown
exercises.instructions: Use a for loop to print numbers from 5 down to 1.
exercises.hints: Start at 5 and decrease with i-- while i >= 1

exercises.title: Nested Loop: Square Pattern
exercises.instructions: Use nested loops to print a 3x3 grid of stars (*).
exercises.hints: Build each row as a string in the inner loop, then console.log the row

exercises.title: For Loop: Find Maximum
exercises.instructions: Find the largest number in the array [4, 7, 2, 9, 5, 1] and print it.
exercises.hints: Compare each number to largest, and update largest if the current number is bigger

exercises.title: Which keyword starts a counting loop in JavaScript?
The loop `for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++)` sets i to 1, 2, 3, 4, 5.
What values does `for (let i = 2; i < 10; i += 2)` give i?
A for...of loop in JavaScript can iterate over a string character by character.
